summary:
A comprehensive, beginner-friendly guide for Module 3 (Shoreline Change Analysis) of the Cape Coast urban geomorphology project. Covers four phases:

Phase A: Shoreline extraction from satellite imagery using MNDWI in Google Earth Engine, with complete GEE scripts for Landsat 7 and a band reference table for all 5 epochs.

Phase B: Data preparation for DSAS including cleaning shorelines in ArcGIS Pro, adding required date/uncertainty fields, merging shorelines, and creating an offshore baseline.

Phase C: Running DSAS v6 standalone application — generating transects at 50m spacing, computing EPR/LRR/NSM/SCE statistics, and exporting results.

Phase D: Mapping and interpreting results with a color-coded erosion/accretion classification scheme and summary statistics.

Includes ASCII diagrams explaining the baseline-transect-shoreline concept, a troubleshooting table, and a deliverables checklist.
